mapper.select: select dr.id as dramaId, dr.title as dramaTitle, dr.cover_url as coverUrl, e.episode_num as episodeNum, concat(floor(wh.progress_seconds/60), ':', lpad(wh.progress_seconds%60, 2, '0'), ' / ', floor(wh.duration/60), ':', lpad(wh.duration%60, 2, '0')) as progress, date_format(wh.update_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as updateTime from watch_history wh left join episode e on wh.episode_id = e.id left join drama dr on e.drama_id = dr.id where wh.user_id = #{userId} order by wh.update_time desc limit #{offset}, #{limit}
